title: Warning Signs For The AI Boom, Anthropic Passes OpenAI, Robinhood’s AI Trading
summary: Alex Kantrowitz and Ranjan Roy discuss warning signs in the AI boom including excessive token consumption, misaligned investment spending, and the circular financing problem. They note Anthropic's rise to highest startup valuation, new applications like AI trading, and emerging privacy and ethics concerns.
